title: Korean-Style Baked Monkfish
description: A flavorful and spicy dish featuring monkfish baked in a Korean-inspired sauce. This recipe is quick, easy, and perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper or aluminum foil.
Rinse the monkfish fillets under cold water, pat dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, whisk together gochujang, soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic, and ginger.
Place the monkfish fillets on the prepared baking sheet, brush the Korean-inspired sauce evenly over both sides of the fillets.
Sprinkle green onions and crushed black pepper over the top of the fillets.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the fish is cooked through and flakes easily with a fork.
